Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Reporting in from the scene. We've just finished up over here.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}The monorail did not sustain any noticeable damage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}When I heard they hijacked a monorail, I feared the worst. Excellent work taking care of that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Now I don't have to worry about tomorrow's headlines.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}They've learned a lot in a surprisingly short time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}But what was up with the Shadows?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}They've never done something like hijacking a train before. This is getting out of hand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I'll be looking into the matter.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Hmm... Let's not jump to any conclusions.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}For now, we should study their behavior for patterns or clues.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}We can't afford to keep waiting for them to make the first move.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}If only I had more power... things wouldn't be so difficult for everyone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Don't be so hard on yourself. You're doing fine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Do you have anything to drink, Sanada-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Why do you look so tired, Ikutsuki-san?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Wait... Don't tell me that bicycle outside is yours![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 10 -1 -1 0 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Boy, am I going to be sore tomorrow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The boy from my dreams warned[n]me about a "hardship"...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like his prediction came true.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder what this could mean...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm too exhausted to make[n]any sense of it right now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should rest as soon as[n]I get back to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
